inline_comments.message: Why not leaving this script in place until there's a final solution? Iterating over a infra_bin_utils.list file with list would be rather a trivial patch.

we don't want to touch shell in this place anymore and we want to have it consistent.
also we want to clean up download from actions there are not really download but data manipulation.
Ok so it means the highlighted code (and what's in 126-128 line) will be automated in a separate script or it will stay for good as a manual step?

The plan is to do that in installation step. We were searching for the optimal way of installation through package manager, but it's not possible in RHEL, so decided to keep this way of installation and in the same step do the move/rename/extract actions. It's still 3 separated steps for the 3 binaries.

Ok so i assume that for e.g. 'rke' binary this will happen somewhere here (change rke_binary to 'rke_linux-amd64'):

$ tail -6 ansible/roles/rke/tasks/rke_config.yml
- name: Install rke cli tool
  copy:
    src: "{{ app_data_path }}/downloads/{{ rke_binary }}"
    dest: "{{ rke_bin_dir }}/rke"
    remote_src: true
    mode: 0755

I didn't see a ticket for that that's why i was confused. Can we create one or it will happen in one of the existing?
I created OOM-1925 - should be all three in the same issue id
